/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/kingo-tray.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/kingo-tray.dir/kingo-tray_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" -o kingo-tray  /usr/lib/libQt5Svg.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Quick.so.5.15.19 libipcclient.a /usr/lib/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5QmlModels.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Qml.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Network.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.19
